title: Take over ownership of ex-users Dashboards
excerpt: I’ve found out how to take ownership of all Boards and Automations once we’ve deactivated a user but I can’t seem to find a way to take ownership of Dashboards they created. Is there a way to do this please?

posts.author: rich-ecologic-sips (Rich Amos)
posts.cookedHtml: I’ve found out how to take ownership of all Boards and Automations once we’ve deactivated a user but I can’t seem to find a way to take ownership of Dashboards they created. Is there a way to do this please?

posts.author: CharlotteK (Charlotte Kirkham)
posts.cookedHtml: Hey Rich! This should be possible when you take over their boards! Did this not work for you? Let me know!

posts.author: mondaytom (T. H.)
posts.cookedHtml:
we have an interm and need to make sure that ownership of all content created by this person has been transferred

the suggested solution here to take ownership can be performed until the person is still there, but what if we overlook an item?

the solution iin 1st post is not disclosed but looks to have some flaws.

is there no way for an admin to change ownership of created items like boards or dashboards?

posts.author: dmenaker (Dave Menaker)
posts.cookedHtml: Doesn’t look like anything ever happened with this. I also have this issue. My ex-users do not own any boards, and I can’t take ownership of the dashboards they created.
